data.title: 国际服总力战 Shiro & Kuro（Urban）1
data.summary: [Total Assault Preview] Total Assault - Shiro & Kuro (Urban Warfare) will be held on 11/29 (Mon)! Fo
data.body:
[Total Assault Preview]

Total Assault - Shiro & Kuro (Urban Warfare) will be held on 11/29 (Mon)!
For this Total Assault, it's on the Mystic Attribute students to play an active part!

Check out the strategies of other Sensei's in the official Discord as well.
![4iKFpv4DUQTJ9DaKIRZfG1UUZ0OotxPs.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/4iKFpv4DUQTJ9DaKIRZfG1UUZ0OotxPs.png)
